compiled_state.title: Tier B: port archive (ARCHIVED event + eligibility) to rebar._commands
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port ticket_archive (ticket-lib-api.sh) to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES. Reproduce the archive-eligibility checks (the bash guards in test-ticket-archive-eligibility.sh) and the ARCHIVED event shape exactly.

Files: src/rebar/_commands/, src/rebar/_engine/rebar (archive arm), src/rebar/__init__.py.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] archive ported + switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] test-ticket-archive-*.sh suites green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Eligibility refusals + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Ported in 0a3ed506: archive with idempotency (.archived marker / ARCHIVED event), open-only status gate via shared reducer, ARCHIVED event through the seam + marker write + confirmation line. Exact-arity pinned via registry max_args. Dual-run green bash AND python on all four archive suites (subcommand 9, archived 6, exclusion-e2e 15, eligibility 13); library parity tests added. Default stays bash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
